evidence.content: MH580 Sports Polarized Sunglasses

100% UV protection and Category 4 lenses fully block intense sunlight and glare. Polarized lens technology enhances object definition and contrast for safer outdoor enjoyment. Designed specifically for regular hikers, these lightweight sunglasses offer excellent support and a comfortable, secure fit. [UV Protection] Made with UV-blocking material to shield your eyes from invisible but harmful UVA and UVB rays—ensuring safe, comfortable vision in any weather. [Polarized Lenses] Optimized for outdoor activities, these lenses deliver vivid colors and sharp contrast while effectively eliminating glare from water or snow. Note: Polarization may reduce smartphone screen visibility. [Lens Tint Selection by Light Conditions] Per ISO 12312-1 standard: - Category 1: Light tints for low-light conditions. - Category 2: Medium tints for moderate sunlight. - Category 3: Dark tints for bright environments (e.g., beach or mountains); 82–92% visible light absorption. - Category 4: Very dark tints for extreme sunlight (e.g., high-altitude mountains); 92–97% visible light absorption. [Important Notes] Decathlon lenses are made of impact-resistant yet scratch-prone polycarbonate. Scratches do not impair UV protection—mirror coatings and tinted colors are purely aesthetic; all tints provide identical protection regardless of shade (gray, brown, etc.). [Warranty] 2 years.
